name: Corned Beef Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the corned beef and cooked potatoes (or substitute coarsely grated raw potato).
2. Chop the onion finely.
3. Mix together in a bowl, adding seasonings, then add egg and mix more.
4. Put in a skillet, coated with oil and form patty 1/2"-3/4" thick.
5. Sprinkle with dry mustard.
6. Cook until crispy (about 10 minutes).
7. Cover with a large plate and flip over.
8. Sprinkle with mustard and cook until crisp.
9. Serve with a fried egg on top.
